Power Apps Grant

Eligible nonprofits get Power Apps free for up to 10 users.

Dynamics 365 Service Applications Fit Assessment

End of Featured stories and announcements slideshow: navigate using the slide tabs section

Dynamics 365 & Power Platform

Dynamics 365 and Power Platform are bringing the power of AI to nonprofits to unify operations, strengthen constituent relationships, and enable data-informed decisions. With integrated tools for managing fundraising, volunteer coordination, program delivery, and impact reporting, these solutions help organizations streamline workflows and focus more resources on mission-critical work.
Watch video

Featured nonprofit offers

Dynamics 365 Business Central

Transform nonprofit operations with Dynamics 365 Business Central, a comprehensive business management solution that connects finance, operations, fundraising, supply chain, and programs—now available to eligible nonprofits at the discounted price of $32.00 (USD) per user per month.
Learn more Get started

Dynamics 365 Service Enterprise

Streamline digital, phone, and field interactions into one intelligent, connected service experience that’s responsive, cost-efficient, and built for the communities you serve. Dynamics 365 Service Enterprise is available to eligible nonprofits at the discounted price of $23.80 (USD) per user per month.
Get started Free assessment

Dynamics 365 Sales Enterprise

Unlock deeper donor relationships by turning data into personalized outreach, predictive insights, and strategic fundraising that scales. Dynamics 365 Sales Enterprise is available to eligible nonprofits at the discounted price of $23.80 (USD) per user per month.
Get started

Microsoft Copilot Studio

Build, customize, and deploy AI-powered agents on a simple, low-code platform to automate tasks, answer questions, and streamline processes. Copilot Studio is now available to eligible nonprofits at the discounted price of $50 (USD) per month for 25,000 messages.
Guided demo Get started

Power Automate

Save time and resources by automating repetitive tasks, streamlining workflows, and improving collaboration across teams. Power Automate Premium is available to eligible nonprofits at the discounted price of $3.75 (USD) per user per month, paid yearly.
Get started

Power Apps

Build and deploy custom AI apps in a low code environment to streamline operations and deliver services more quickly. Eligible nonprofits get Power Apps free for up to 10 users and discounted pricing of $2.50 (USD) per user per month for additional users.
Get started

Nonprofit events

Discover tailored events and training opportunities to maximize your impact and advance your nonprofit’s mission. Gain expert insights, connect with industry leaders, and explore solutions centered on nonprofit scenarios.
Learn more

Connect with a partner

Our partners make it their mission to help accelerate your mission. These select Dynamics 365 and Power Platform partners are ready to deliver solutions that support your nonprofit’s AI transformation.
Find a partner

Nonprofit offers

Power your organization with technology grants and discounts for nonprofits. Register and confirm your organization’s eligibility to access Microsoft nonprofit offers.
Learn more Get started

Contact us

Microsoft representatives can help you find the right products for your organization and address inquiries related to offer eligibility and technical support.
Contact us

Microsoft Elevate for Changemakers

Become an AI champion for your team through credentials, a global peer community, training and resources to help build capacity for responsible AI adoption and greater impact.
Get started today
